Name: Eastman EAWSI 200 Arc Welding 200A Inverter Welder IGBT Technology Lightweight 4kg Fan Cooled Set Cables Mask Brush
Description: ADVANCED IGBT TECHNOLOGY: Utilizes state-of-the-art Insulated-Gate Bipolar Transistor (IGBT) technology for a more stable arc, superior power efficiency, and exceptionally smooth welding results. POWERFUL & ADJUSTABLE: Features a wide and adjustable welding current range of 20-200A, accommodating various metal thicknesses and operating safely on a 160-250V input voltage. FAN-COOLED SYSTEM: Engineered with an integrated cooling fan that dissipates heat rapidly, providing better performance and extending the operational lifespan of the machine. LIGHTWEIGHT & PORTABLE: Weighing a mere 4.00 kg with a compact form factor, this welding set is exceptionally easy to carry, making it perfect for both workshop and remote field jobs. COMPLETE ACCESSORY KIT: Comes fully equipped with everything you need to start immediately, including an earth connection cable, a heavy-duty welding cable, a safety mask, and a cleaning brush. › See more product details
